input.content:
Subject: Welcome to [Platform Name]! 🎉 Get Started in Minutes

---

Hi [Customer Name],

Welcome to [Platform Name]! We're thrilled to have you join our community of [number] happy users.

Thank you for signing up. You've just taken the first step toward [brief description of platform benefit - e.g., "streamlining your workflow" or "boosting your productivity"].

GETTING STARTED

To help you hit the ground running, we've prepared a few resources:

1. Getting Started Guide: [link]
   Learn the basics and set up your account in just 5 minutes.

2. Video Tutorial: [link]
   Watch our quick overview to understand [Platform Name]'s core features.

3. Knowledge Base: [link]
   Browse our comprehensive documentation for in-depth guides and troubleshooting.

YOUR NEXT STEPS

✓ Complete your profile - Add a profile picture and company information
✓ Explore the dashboard - Familiarize yourself with the main features
✓ Configure your preferences - Set up notifications and integrations
✓ [Platform-specific action] - [Brief description]

NEED HELP?

Our support team is here to help! Reach out to us at:
• Email: support@[company].com
• Live Chat: [link]
• Help Center: [link]
• Community Forum: [link]

SPECIAL OFFER FOR NEW USERS

As a token of our appreciation, enjoy [offer details - e.g., "30 days of premium features free" or "20% off your first year"] with code: [PROMO_CODE]

This offer expires on [date], so make sure to take advantage of it!

WHAT'S NEXT?

Over the coming weeks, we'll send you helpful tips and best practices to ensure you get the most out of [Platform Name]. Feel free to unsubscribe from these emails at any time.

We're excited to help you [achieve your goals / solve your problem / grow your business]. If you have any questions or feedback, don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Platform Name] Team

P.S. Follow us on [social media] for product updates, tips, and industry insights!

---

[Footer with unsubscribe link and company information]
Unsubscribe | Update Preferences | [Company Name] © 2024

final_response:
Perfect! I've created a comprehensive welcome email template for your SaaS platform and saved it to `/workspace/welcome-email.txt`. 

The template includes:

✅ **Key sections:**
- Warm greeting and thank you
- Getting Started resources (guides, videos, documentation)
- Clear next steps for users
- Multiple support channels
- Special offer/promo incentive
- Expectations for future communications

✅ **Customization placeholders:**
- [Platform Name] - Your SaaS product name
- [Customer Name] - Pers
